# Socio Economic Features

**Summary**: Human-made features like desalination plants and ports that require protection from oil impacts.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2016-sudibyo|Sudibyo, 2016]] identified socio-economic features to prioritize infrastructure protection.

## Scientific Context

- [[2016-sudibyo|Sudibyo, 2016]] Determines the impact of pollution on human welfare and economic activity.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2016-sudibyo|Sudibyo, 2016]] Identified via spatial mapping of industrial zones and public areas.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Desalination plants are categorized as being of the highest sensitivity with the red color code. ([[2016-sudibyo|Sudibyo, 2016, p. 80]])
